items.title: He styled himself as a Comanchero boss on TikTok, then police uncovered his plot

items.title: Why the gas giants stopped gouging

children.content: After a decade and a half of mostly failed threats from three prime ministers and constant surveillance by the competition regulator, the east coast gas export giants are suddenly putting Australians first.

items.title: Did you really get a discount on your Tim Tams? The ACCC doesn't think so

items.title: 'Pretty invisible': The rise of ADHD medication being prescribed to young women

children.content: Within the sharp increase of ADHD rates in Australia lies a hidden story — more women are being prescribed medication than men. Understanding why is more complicated.

items.title: Gas tax fight escalates ahead of budget as inquiry begins

children.content: The 21-year-old, who rose to fame after going viral on TikTok, is facing charges including first-degree murder, lewd and lascivious acts with an individual under 14, and mutilating a body.

items.title: For the first time in decades, cash use in Australia has increased

items.title: 'It's just bulldozed through': Native title holders allege cultural sites have been destroyed by mining company

items.title: Residents urged to stay in as burnt battery product may react with forecast rain

items.title: 'All you want as a parent': The disability program leading to home-ownership

children.content: Not-for-profit Project Independence uses residents' disability support pension to share in a property, giving them legal ownership of their home and allowing them to build equity over time.

image.altText: A woman with long dark hair stands smiling outdoors, with a man and woman with grey hair on either side of her.

items.title: Turtles buried under mud at NSW wetlands after water inflows halted

children.content: Researchers in north-west NSW are wading through thick mud in an attempt to save hundreds of turtles after the NSW government decided to stop supplying water to the protected wetland.
Conservation biologists say the Gingham Waterhole in the Gwydir Wetlands near Moree is facing an "ecological disaster".

image.altText: Two people pull a turtle out of mud and bag it up

gallery.altText: Image shows turtles in container covered in mud.

thumbnail.altText: Image shows turtles in container covered in mud.
